id.description: The unique identifier for the campaign.

account_id.description: The Twitter Ads account id this campaign belongs to. Carried from the parent /accounts/{id}/campaigns call by the connector; the API response payload itself does not include it. Nullable so the schema stays compatible with rows synced before this field was attached.

funding_instrument_id.description: The funding instrument this campaign bills against.

entity_status.description: Configured status of the campaign entity.

effective_status.description: Runtime delivery status (e.g. RUNNING, PAUSED_BY_USER, ENDED). Nullable on older rows.

servable.description: Whether the campaign is currently eligible to serve.

reasons_not_servable.description: Reasons the campaign is not servable, when applicable.

daily_budget_amount_local_micro.description: The daily budget amount in local micro currency, or null if not set.

total_budget_amount_local_micro.description: The total budget amount in local micro currency, or null if not set.

currency.description: The currency used for the campaign budgets.

standard_delivery.description: Whether standard (vs accelerated) delivery is used.

frequency_cap.description: Frequency cap for the campaign, or null if not set.

duration_in_days.description: Duration of the campaign in days, or null if not set.

end_time.description: Campaign end timestamp; null for open-ended campaigns.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the campaign was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the campaign was last updated.
